name: Pizza Palace
greeting: Welcome to Pizza Palace. I can help you build your perfect pizza. What would you like to order?

toolSchemas.name: add_pizza
toolSchemas.description: Add a pizza to the order. Use when the customer has decided on a pizza.

toolSchemas.name: place_order
toolSchemas.description: Place the final order. Use when the customer confirms they are done and ready to order.

toolSchemas.name: remove_pizza
toolSchemas.description: Remove a pizza from the order by its ID.

toolSchemas.name: set_customer_name
toolSchemas.description: Set the customer name for the order.

toolSchemas.name: update_pizza
toolSchemas.description: Update an existing pizza in the order. Only provided fields are changed.

toolSchemas.name: view_order
toolSchemas.description: View the current order summary with all pizzas and total price.
